---
title: "Aggregate Model Data"
author: "Rhiannon Nolan"
date: "September 08, 2025"
output:
  html_document:
  toc: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{R, echo=FALSE}
#GLOBAL R chunk options.
#   (to hide this message add "echo=FALSE" to the code chunk options)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(comment = NA, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, width = 100)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.align = "center", fig.height = 4, fig.width = 6)

#knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = TRUE, autodep=TRUE)
```

This script uses csv files created after maxent models have been run for all species across all time bins. 
First the tables of results are filtered to include only environmental pixels where threshold = 1 (inside the realized niche).


## Load in all csv files
```{R}
library(tidyverse)
#search for species
setwd("D:/202508_MaxentModels/3_MaxentModels_OldData")

#list of species
SppList <- list.files("D:/202508_MaxentModels/3_MaxentModels_OldData", pattern = "_") #only works as long as only folders have a "_" in them, change if needed so the list is just a list of taxa

maxent_dat <- data.frame()


#read in csv files from maxent models
#for loop to find species, time bins

for (Spp in SppList){ #for each species found in the model folder
  
  path <- paste0("D:/202508_MaxentModels/3_MaxentModels_OldData/", Spp)   #path for spp folder
  
  name <- strsplit(Spp, "_")[[1]] #set up the file name for the species
  firstw <- name[1]
  lastw <- name[2]
  TAXON <- paste0(substr(firstw, 1, 1), substr(lastw, 1, 3)) 
  
  times <- list.files(path) #make a list of times available for the species
  
  for (t in times){ #read in the csv for that species at that time
    
    timepath <- paste0(path, "/", t) #set path to time folder
    
    file <- paste0(timepath, "/", TAXON, ".clim.output.", t, ".csv") #set path for csv file
    if( file.exists(file)){
    dat <- read.csv(file) #read in the file for that data
    
    #change threshold column names so they all can be bound by rows
    dat <- dat %>% dplyr::rename(
       suitability = paste0(TAXON, "_contin"),
       raw_thresh = paste0(TAXON, "_thresh"),
    )
    maxent_dat <- bind_rows(maxent_dat, dat)#put it all in one dataframe
    }
  }
}

str(maxent_dat)
```

```{r}
setwd("D:/202508_MaxentModels/4_MahalanobisDist")
write.csv(maxent_dat, "olddat_maxent_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
